zh.lifeSummary: 當John VII Maltravers於1350年出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾可洛維爾時，他的父親John Mautravers41歲，母親Elizabeth Syfrewast36歲。他和Elizabeth d'Aumarle至少有2個女兒。他去世於1386年6月15日在英國英格蘭多瑟特阿波次波利享年36歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特阿波次波利。

nameMeanings.name: Maltravers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Matravers
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Mautravert in Chérencé-le-Héron (Manche).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

nameMeanings.name: VII
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Vivian   and   Vivien .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When John VII Maltravers was born in 1350, in Crowell, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Mautravers, was 41 and his mother, Elizabeth Syfrewast, was 36. He had at least 2 daughters with Elizabeth d'Aumarle. He died on 15 June 1386, in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 36, and was buried in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John VII Maltravers est né en 1350, à Crowell, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Mautravers, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Syfrewast, avait 36 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 filles avec Elizabeth d'Aumarle. Il est décédé le 15 juin 1386, à Abbotsbury, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans, et a été enterré à Abbotsbury, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hatte mit Elizabeth d'Aumarle mindestens 2 Töchter. Er starb am 15. Juni 1386 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Abbotsbury, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: John VII Maltraversが1350年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアクロウエルで生まれた時，父John Mautraversは41歳，母Elizabeth Syfrewastは36歳であった。彼はElizabeth d'Aumarleとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1386年6月15日にイギリスイギリスドールセトアボトスブリーで36歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトアボトスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John VII Maltravers(이)가 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 크로월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Mautravers(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Syfrewast(은)는 36세였다. 그는 Elizabeth d'Aumarle(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1386년 6월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 애벗스버이에서 36세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 애벗스버이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John VII Maltravers родился в 1350 г. в местности кроуелл, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Mautravers было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Syfrewast, 36. У него было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Elizabeth d'Aumarle. Он умер 15 июня 1386 г. в местности эббоцбури, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет и был похоронен в местности эббоцбури, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.
